taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: Pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science or related field (preference for rising seniors/upcoming graduates), GPA of 3.0 or higher, Ability to work at our headquarters in Boca Raton, Florida, on a hybrid basis during the internship, Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills, Self-motivated, adaptable, and eager to learn
preferred_quals: Experience or coursework with Java, Spring, Python, .NET, Experience or coursework with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Experience or coursework with SQL, Kafka, Experience or coursework with Grafana, Experience or coursework with Angular (preferred)
core_responsibilities: Solve complex, real-world problems through software development, Contribute to frontend, backend, mobile, and/or data engineering projects, See your code come to life and impact thousands of users, Collaborate with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced, Agile environment
job_summary: ModMed is a company focused on modernizing the healthcare experience through innovative technology. They are looking for passionate interns to join their Product Development team, where they will work on meaningful projects in software development and gain hands-on experience in various engineering domains.
